positive.stdout:

for all inputs,
    define multiple_birth_with_siblings(X0) := $false
for all inputs,

negative.stdout:

% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u28,axiom,
    ~is_baby_multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,
    siblings_born_together(luke)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth_with_siblings(X0) | spend_time_with_siblings(X0)).

    complains_about_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~complains_about_siblings(X0) | siblings_born_together(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~siblings_born_together(X0) | multiple_birth_with_siblings(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~spend_time_with_siblings(X0) | lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    spend_time_with_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~lives_with_strangers(X0) | ~lives_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u36,negated_conjecture,
    multiple_birth_with_siblings(luke)).

cnf(u38,negated_conjecture,
    lives_at_home(luke)).
